_note: Curated list of fleet/dealership cold-pitch targets within auto-book range. Reactivation engine rotates through these weekly. Edit freely as Charlie/Kabir do walk-ins. Mark 'do_not_pitch' for refusals so they don't recycle.

targets.name: Rosewood Toyota Stratford
targets.angle: New-vehicle prep + ceramic upsell at point of sale. They don't have a full-time detailer.
targets.contact: Sales manager — walk in Tue/Thu morning

targets.name: Stratford Mitsubishi
targets.angle: Service-loaner program — easy recurring weekly volume.

targets.name: Stratford Kia
targets.angle: Pre-delivery inspection details + customer ceramic referrals.

targets.name: Stratford Ford
targets.angle: F-150 / Bronco buyers are prime ceramic + interior protection candidates.

targets.name: Sebringville Auto Sales
targets.angle: ~30 used cars/mo turning. Wholesale-rate exterior detail wins this lot.

targets.name: Stratford Chrysler Dodge Jeep Ram
targets.angle: Ram + Jeep buyers — high ceramic conversion. Ask about their PDI process.

targets.name: Stratford Taxi / Festival City Cabs
targets.angle: Weekly interior detail keeps the fleet professional. Negotiate flat per-vehicle rate.

targets.name: Stratford Festival (executive vehicles)
targets.angle: Their visiting talent + executive cars. Premium tier customer with long-term volume.

targets.name: U-Haul Stratford
targets.angle: Rental fleet between rentals — exterior + interior wipe-down.

targets.name: Enterprise Rent-A-Car Stratford
targets.angle: Same model — quick-turn between rentals. They detail in-house but overflow days are wins.
